finding: TASK-RFT-0033 made tasks/legacy-impl.ts a thin facade, but the moved implementation remains a transitional compact carrier instead of readable semantic command modules.
expectedBehavior: Tasks import, status, close, audit, scope, queue, roster, and parser compatibility logic should live in typed bounded modules that each stay below the line budget without compact carrier compression.
evidenceOrRepro: packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/legacy/implementation.ts was created during TASK-RFT-0033 to preserve behavior while satisfying the immediate facade split and line-count gate.
followUp: Open follow-up refactor cards to expand tasks/legacy/implementation.ts into typed command modules, keep facade exports stable, and keep tests/cli/tasks-legacy-impl-extraction.test.ts green.
